title: Gallimimus Running in Plains Coloring Page
seoTitle: Gallimimus Running in Plains Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Speeding Gallimimus sprinting across a prehistoric open plain with cycads. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Gallimimus Running in Plains had a toothless beak, large eyes, and long, slender legs that made it one of the fastest dinosaurs, capable of speeds up to 35 mph.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing color harmony and edge precision using dual-brush markers.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about natural botany and organic patterns while developing fine motor coordination.
